paper_reference: Swissmetro benchmark from the pylogit Swissmetro example
notes: This line is labeled as a public reverse engineering of the Swissmetro stated-preference survey, not as an exact historical recovery of the original questionnaire or DOE files.
The human benchmark is the four-parameter MNL reproduced by the pylogit Swissmetro notebook and re-estimated in Biogeme.
AI respondents are synthetic personas sampled with replacement from the cleaned respondent-profile distribution.
AI respondents answer the survey one task at a time in a multi-turn conversation.
AI panels are reconstructed from template families inferred from the public data rather than direct respondent-level task bundle reuse.
